medium.message: React Hook useCallback has missing dependencies: 'scanMonths', 'selectedAdditions', 'selectedEmailIds', and 'selectedUpdates'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suppressedMessages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.

messages.message: React Hook useCallback has missing dependencies: 'scanMonths', 'selectedAdditions', 'selectedEmailIds', and 'selectedUpdates'. Either include them or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [scan, scanMonths, selectedAdditions, selectedEmailIds, selectedUpdates, showError, t]

fix.text: [scan, scanMonths, selectedAdditions, selectedEmailIds, selectedUpdates, showError, t]

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.
